assessment.note: Names a specific missing guide for escalation versus batching, which is a strong clarity gap and shows hesitation to engage directly.

new_queue.label: Escalate vs batch
new_queue.name: What would a useful escalate-versus-batch guide need to cover?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific escalation ambiguity he named so the manager can remove friction fast.

new_queue.label: Context gaps
new_queue.name: What context are you still waiting on before you change a design or make an architecture call?
new_queue.description: Surfaces missing information that could quietly lead to rework or wrong assumptions.

new_queue.label: Incident norms
new_queue.name: How should you know when to escalate during an incident here?
new_queue.description: Checks whether he understands the practical trigger points for escalation and support.

new_queue.label: Support network
new_queue.name: Who do you want to lean on first when you hit something unclear?
new_queue.description: Identifies the people and channels that should become his default support path.

new_queue.label: Useful next step
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you, Riley?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete support or adjustments that would improve his onboarding momentum.
